TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: DeAndre' Bembry hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas te 1994, byacing te 7 ru 4 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga North Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2016 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players gocyu trang gocyu mqwas biru beh Rocky River High School . wal mqwas beh mzyu mari na St. Patrick High School . pspung mzyu mari magan 21.8 ru qeru mari qlcing.
S.PHON: *ean*re Ē ő≤emő≤rj ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw / praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a nortńß ¶~ ®arolina, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu atlanta ńßawks~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē …£o ¶~ ®ju traŇč …£o ¶~ ®ju mqwas~…ē ő≤iru ő≤eńß ro ¶~ ®kj ri*er ńßi…£ńß s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool . wal mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß mzju mari na s~…ēt. patri ¶~ ®k ńßi…£ńß s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool . ps~…ēpuŇč mzju mari ma…£an **.* ru qeru mari ql ¶~ ®iŇč.
S.FORM: DeAndre' Bembry hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas te 1994, byacing te 7 ru 4 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga North Carolina, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 95 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2016 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Atlanta Hawks. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players gocyu trang gocyu mqwas biru beh Rocky River High School . wal mqwas beh mzyu mari na St. Patrick High School . pspung mzyu mari magan 21.8 ru qeru mari qlcing.
S.PHON: *ean*re Ē ő≤emő≤rj ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa p Ēa…£al tins~…ē Ē taj s~…ēuruw / praw maki Ē taj…£laiŇč. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te * ru * rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a nortńß ¶~ ®arolina, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, ** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. kawas~…ē **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari …£a, mzjup s~…ēqu te qutux lańßuj ru te ma…£al s~…ēquliq, …£alun nqu atlanta ńßawks~…ē. pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an nja Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē …£o ¶~ ®ju traŇč …£o ¶~ ®ju mqwas~…ē ő≤iru ő≤eńß ro ¶~ ®kj ri*er ńßi…£ńß s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool . wal mqwas~…ē ő≤eńß mzju mari na s~…ēt. patri ¶~ ®k ńßi…£ńß s~…ē ¶~ ®ńßool . ps~…ēpuŇč mzju mari ma…£an **.* ru qeru mari ql ¶~ ®iŇč.
